events.fact: Player begins Day 11 and plans for the Eikthyr boss fight, identifying the need for feathers, wood, and a backup bow.
Player crafts a backup crude bow at the workbench.
Player crafts 200 fire arrows to be used against Eikthyr.
Player upgrades the crude bow using leather scraps.
The first boar is successfully tamed.
Player upgrades the wood shield at the workbench.
Player upgrades the flint axe after gathering flint from the southern coastline.
The second boar is successfully tamed.
Player locates an abandoned house near the Eikthyr altar and begins retrofitting it into a temporary respawn base.
Player builds a bed in the temporary shelter to set a spawn point.
Player crafts a hoe to level the ground inside the temporary shelter.
Boss Fight: Eikthyr is summoned at the altar using three deer trophies.
Eikthyr is defeated using fire arrows and a flint axe.
Player loots Hard Antlers and the Eikthyr Trophy from the boss.
Player mounts the Eikthyr Trophy at the Sacrificial Stones.
Player activates the Eikthyr Forsaken Power, granting a stamina buff for running and jumping.
Player crafts the Antler Pickaxe, enabling the mining of copper and tin.
